strategy.name: US Market Regime Dual-Engine Screener
strategy.summary: Daily US stock scanner that switches between breakout and oversold-rebound engines based on SPY vs SMA200.

market_regime_logic.rule: Bull if close > SMA200, else weak

bull.title: Bull: Breakout Momentum Engine
rules: Liquidity filter and minimum price must pass
bull.take_profit: Take profit: resistance_level + 1x ATR14 (fallback close + 3x ATR14)

weak.title: Weak: Oversold Rebound Engine
rules: Liquidity filter and minimum price must pass
weak.take_profit: Take profit: resistance_level + 1x ATR14 (fallback close + 3x ATR14)

fundamental_checklist: Dividend Yield (income support in weak tape)
Revenue/EPS growth and balance-sheet debt trend
strategy.risk_notice: Signals are for research only, not investment advice. Enforce stop-loss and position sizing discipline.
